mapper.sql: id, batch_no, box_id, box_name, site_id, site_name, platform_type, total_count, new_count, updated_count, skipped_count, failed_count, status, summary, reverted, create_time, create_by
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT FROM gb_import_batch b
AND b.box_id = #{boxId} AND b.site_id = #{siteId} AND b.status = #{status} AND b.reverted = #{reverted} AND b.platform_type = #{platformType}
AND FIND_IN_SET(b.batch_no, #{batchNos}) > 0
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM gb_game_change_log c WHERE c.batch_id = b.id AND c.game_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{gameName}, '%') )
UNION ALL
SELECT -MAX(c.id) AS id, c.batch_no AS batch_no, NULL AS box_id, '手工修改' AS box_name, NULL AS site_id, '手工修改' AS site_name, 'manual' AS platform_type, COUNT(1) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN c.change_type = 'INSERT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS new_count, SUM(CASE WHEN c.change_type = 'UPDATE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS updated_count, 0 AS skipped_count, 0 AS failed_count, 'manual' AS status, NULL AS summary, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(c.reverted, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS reverted, MAX(c.create_time) AS create_time, MAX(c.create_by) AS create_by FROM gb_game_change_log c
c.batch_id IS NULL AND c.batch_no IS NOT NULL AND c.batch_no != '' AND 1 = 0 AND 1 = 0 AND #{status} = 'manual' AND #{platformType} = 'manual'
AND FIND_IN_SET(c.batch_no, #{batchNos}) > 0
AND c.game_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{gameName}, '%')
GROUP BY c.batch_no
HAVING CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(c.reverted, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END = #{reverted}
) t ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE gb_import_batch SET reverted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
